title: ononis aragonensis f. microphylla
intro: Ononis aragonensis f. microphylla is a variant of the Ononis aragonensis plant, a species of legume in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a type of restharrow. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ononis aragonensis f. microphylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
